Coins.title: Coins
Coins.description: The standard currency known to be used throughout the slog.

Diamond.title: Space diamond
Diamond.description: An extremely rare industrial commodity. Preferably used as a building material rather than jewellery due to its superior hardness.

FuelCell.title: Fuel cell
FuelCell.description: Contains Plutonium. Ensures the Plutonium stays stable until it is needed to be used.

Uranium.title: Uranium
Uranium.description: An extremely dense material which can be refined into Plutonium and then stored in Fuel Cells.

Titanium.title: Titanium
Titanium.description: A relatively lightweight yet durable metal alloy. Can be used to construct a large variety of structures, weapons and other machinery.

Glass.title: Glass
Glass.description: A transparent material commonly used for windows. It is brittle and can break easily.

Silver.title: Silver
Silver.description: A type of white metal often used for construction but not as strong as other metals.

Alloys.title: Alloys
Alloys.description: These alloys are exceptionally light and durable, yet extremely rare and expensive.

Gold.title: Gold
Gold.description: A highly valuable shiny metal. Not quite as strong as other metals but it looks pretty.

Silicon.title: Silicon
Silicon.description: A versatile element essential for electronics and computer components.

Logs.title: Hardwood logs
Logs.description: Gathered from certain types of trees from some planets. Can be used for building structures and weapons.

Cloth.title: Cloth
Cloth.description: A soft and comfortable fabric created from cotton fibers.

Linen.title: Linen
Linen.description: A strong and durable fabric created from flax fibers.

Leather.title: Leather
Leather.description: A strong, flexible and durable material created from animal skins.

Wool.title: Wool
Wool.description: A natural breathable fibre. Great for insulation.

CarbonFibre.title: Carbon fibre cloth
CarbonFibre.description: A strong, flexible and durable material created from carbon.

Concrete.title: Concrete
Concrete.description: An extremely heavy but strong man-made material. It's probably not the best choice for use in spaceships.

Sandstone.title: Sandstone
Sandstone.description: A relatively soft type of rock that can break easily.

Rock.title: Rock
Rock.description: A piece of natural material composed of minerals.

Carbon.title: Carbon
Carbon.description: Carbon can be used to create carbon fibre.

Granite.title: Granite
Granite.description: An extremely hard type of rock.

Ice.title: Ice
Ice.description: Can be used to produce oxygen or melted down for water.
